config.AlexFemale.name: Alex is female
config.AlexFemale.description: Make Alex a woman: changes the gender data and rewrites her gendered dialogue, marriage, references and heart events (English & Russian).

config.SebastianName.name: Sebastian: name (English)
config.SebastianName.description: Custom name used in English dialogue and as her display name. Leave as-is to keep the original.
config.SebastianNameNom.name: Sebastian: Russian name (nominative)
config.SebastianNameNom.description: Russian name in the nominative case (она). Also used as her Russian display name.
config.SebastianNameGen.name: Sebastian: Russian name (genitive)
config.SebastianNameGen.description: Russian name in the genitive case (у неё / для неё).
config.SebastianNameAcc.name: Sebastian: Russian name (accusative)
config.SebastianNameAcc.description: Russian name in the accusative case (вижу её).
config.SebastianNameIns.name: Sebastian: Russian name (instrumental)
config.SebastianNameIns.description: Russian name in the instrumental case (с ней).
